# Terms of Use

_Last updated: 2026-06-27_

## Acceptance

By accessing the website or repository, you agree to use it only for lawful, public-safe, non-confidential review and experimentation. If you do not agree, do not use the website, repository, public chamber, Expert Console, documentation, or generated artifacts.

## Informational and technical surface only

The website and repository provide software, documentation, code, generated pages, schemas, evidence surfaces, and operator tooling. They do not provide legal, financial, investment, tax, accounting, medical, employment, procurement, regulatory, compliance, cybersecurity certification, or professional advice.

## No data wanted

You must not submit personal data, private keys, wallet seed phrases, confidential business data, customer data, sensitive personal information, regulated data, or secrets. If you put such information into GitHub, a wallet, a blockchain transaction, a third-party service, or a downloaded/uploaded file, you are solely responsible for the consequences and compliance obligations.

## Wallet and Mainnet responsibility

Any wallet connection, token approval, network switch, gas estimate, transaction simulation, or Mainnet broadcast is initiated solely by the human operator through the separated Expert Console and the operator's wallet. The project does not custody funds, does not sign for users, does not store keys, does not guarantee transaction outcomes, and does not reverse blockchain actions.

## Investment and token boundary

Nothing on the website or repository is an offer, sale, recommendation, solicitation, investment contract, securities offering, investment advice, broker-dealer service, exchange service, staking program, yield product, profit promise, dividend promise, equity interest, debt instrument, or ownership claim. References to AGIALPHA are protocol-utility and identity references only.

## Automated assurance boundary

Automated assurance files, QA checks, build manifests, factual checks, and Evidence Dockets are software artifacts. They are not external audit opinions, legal opinions, regulated certifications, factual guarantees, security guarantees, or production approvals.

## User/operator burden

You are solely responsible for your jurisdiction, eligibility, lawfulness, privacy obligations, tax obligations, securities obligations, sanctions/export obligations, consumer-protection duties, procurement duties, internal approvals, wallet security, RPC/provider choices, transaction review, and any data or content you choose to use.

## No warranties

The materials are provided as-is and as-available. To the maximum extent permitted by law, all warranties are disclaimed, including merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, non-infringement, accuracy, availability, security, and uninterrupted operation.

## Limitation of liability

To the maximum extent permitted by law, the project, authors, maintainers, contributors, publishers, and affiliated entities are not liable for lost profits, lost tokens, lost funds, lost data, business interruption, security incidents, third-party failures, wallet mistakes, transaction errors, regulatory consequences, tax consequences, chain reorgs, gas losses, market losses, or indirect, incidental, consequential, special, exemplary, or punitive damages.

## Indemnity

To the maximum extent permitted by law, you agree to defend, indemnify, and hold harmless the project, authors, maintainers, contributors, publishers, and affiliated entities from claims, losses, liabilities, damages, fines, costs, and expenses arising from your use, your wallet actions, your content, your data, your transactions, your legal non-compliance, or your breach of these terms.
